message:
Fix breadcrumb to replace all hyphens in category names

The previous code only replaced the first hyphen in category slugs
when displaying them in the breadcrumb. This uses a global regex
to replace all hyphens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
